proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` values are associated with higher `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_041` increases mean progression-free survival.

analyses.method: Univariable OLS slope for pfs_months on the feature.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_036=0` patients have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` not equal to 0.
`feature_036=2` patients have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` not equal to 2.

analyses.result_summary: feature_036=0: effect 1.3797 months (0 vs all other values; p<1e-300).
analyses.method: Two-group mean comparison on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_036=2: effect -1.5048 months (2 vs all other values; p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_010=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among `feature_037=1` patients than among `feature_037=0` patients.

analyses.method: OLS interaction model pfs_months ~ indicator A + indicator B + A:B.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_010=1` and `feature_009=1` have a positive interaction, so patients with both indicators have higher `pfs_months` than expected from adding their individual effects.
